payload.answer: Duplicate Slack delivery detected; no new memory should be committed.
citations: Input: "Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans"

entity_resolution.reason: This is a transport-level duplicate delivery, not a durable entity to resolve.

relationships.object: same Slack event ID delivered twice
relationships.subject: Slack event

memory_cards.statement: A Slack event was delivered twice; the input appears to be a duplicate retry of the same event.

details: Detected same Slack event ID delivered twice.
Skipped durable memory commitment to avoid duplication.

repair_options: Ignore the repeated delivery and process only the first occurrence.
If the original event was not yet handled, treat this as a retry rather than new information.
